class.name: AbilitySystemEffectSpec
class.brief_description: Runtime instance of an ability system effect.
class.description: [AbilitySystemEffectSpec] represents an instance of a [AbilitySystemEffect] being applied, storing remaining duration and dynamic magnitudes.

method.name: calculate_modifier_magnitude
method.description: Calculates the magnitude for the modifier at the given index, considering level and custom calculations.

method.name: get_duration_remaining
method.description: Returns the remaining duration for this effect spec.

method.name: get_effect
method.description: Returns the effect definition resource for this spec.

method.name: get_level
method.description: Returns the level of this effect spec.

method.name: get_magnitude
method.description: Returns the calculated magnitude for the attribute with the given name.

method.name: get_source_component
method.description: Returns the source component that applied this effect.

method.name: get_target_component
method.description: Returns the target component receiving this effect.

method.name: get_total_duration
method.description: Returns the total duration for this effect spec.

method.name: init
method.description: Initializes this spec with an effect resource and level.

method.name: set_duration_remaining
method.description: Sets the remaining duration for this effect spec.

method.name: set_level
method.description: Sets the level of this effect spec.

method.name: set_magnitude
method.description: Sets the calculated magnitude for the attribute with the given name.
